description.value: Arman The Parman is a Bitcoin education and security mentor, and the creator of Parmanode, an easy automated Bitcoin node installation package for desktop and laptop computers on Mac and Linux. Parmanode lets non-technical users securely download, verify and run Bitcoin software such as Bitcoin Core, the Fulcrum Electrum server, LND, BTCPay, Tor, Mempool and Sparrow without command-line interaction. It bundles node software with associated educational material aimed at self-custody and running your own node.
